implementation_summary.summary: CP00-862 bridges the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only permission decision matrix tail into Hermes evidence and Claude review packet head across RP28.P06.M07.S07-RP28.P06.M09.S02 without emitting Hermes runtime receipts, executing Claude as final approval, writing permission decisions, writing audit events, writing product state, or using real client data.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-862 RP28.P06.M07.S07-RP28.P06.M09.S02 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP00-862-P3-01 is closed by running and recording the full deterministic validation suite after review normalization, adjudication update, and queue regeneration, before commit.
